requirements_addressed: AC-001: Module exists with dataclass and loader function
AC-002: Loader reads `name` field from manifest

completion_promises.criterion_text: Module guardkit/knowledge/template_pattern_loader.py exists with the dataclass and loader function.
completion_promises.evidence: Created guardkit/knowledge/template_pattern_loader.py with TemplatePatternContext dataclass (6 fields: template_name, template_dir, available_files, selected_files, prompt_block, warnings) and load_template_patterns(manifest_path) function. TestTemplatePatternContext class verifies all fields exist and accept correct types.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Loader reads the `name` field from .claude/manifest.json (confirmed to be the actual field per review F1).
completion_promises.evidence: load_template_patterns() extracts data.get('name') from parsed manifest JSON. Test test_reads_name_field_from_manifest verifies the name field is correctly read and stored in ctx.template_name.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Missing manifest returns TemplatePatternContext(template_name=None, ...) with a warning; does not raise.
completion_promises.evidence: FileNotFoundError, OSError, and JSONDecodeError are all caught and return degraded contexts with descriptive warnings. Tests: test_missing_manifest_returns_none_with_warning, test_invalid_json_returns_none_with_warning, test_missing_name_field_returns_none_with_warning, test_os_error_returns_warning, test_never_raises_on_any_failure, test_empty_name_field_returns_warning all verify graceful degradation without raising.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unresolvable template name has same graceful-degradation behaviour.
completion_promises.evidence: When resolve_template_source_dir() returns None, the function returns a TemplatePatternContext with template_name set but template_dir=None and a warning. Tests: test_unresolvable_template_returns_none_with_warning and test_no_templates_subdir_returns_warning verify this path.

completion_promises.criterion_text: For a valid fastapi-python project, available_files contains all 13 .template files under installer/core/templates/fastapi-python/templates/.
completion_promises.evidence: The loader uses rglob('*.template') on the templates/ subdirectory to enumerate all .template files recursively. Test test_valid_template_populates_available_files verifies available_files is populated with the correct count and all entries end in .template. The actual fastapi-python template directory contains exactly 13 .template files (verified via find command during development).

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Both files compile cleanly with python -m py_compile. Code follows PEP 8, uses type hints throughout, has from __future__ import annotations, uses pathlib.Path, and uses logging module per project conventions.
